name: Grilled Eggplant, Tomato, Zucchini & Squash S
recipeIngredient: 1 Yellow squash, sliced on the bias
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the vegetables 1/4-inch thick.
2. Clean and slice the eggplant.
3. Dip each piece of eggplant in lightly beaten egg whites.
4. Coat with whole-wheat bread crumbs.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until soft.
6. Wash and slice remaining vegetables.
7. Pat dry and grill or steam zucchini and yellow squash.
8. Place the vegetables in a bowl, sprinkle with vinegar, and cover for 10 minutes.
9. To assemble: place Eggplant crusts on the bottom.
10. Layer with zucchini, squash, and tomato slices.
11. Sprinkle with cheese and reheat to melt.
12. Serve with optional red pepper stripes on top and Pearl Barley Salad (recipe follows).
13. Makes 4 servings.
